final.summary:
Tailoring log for: Conversational AI Engineer (LLM & Google Cloud).

- Profile summary: revised (heuristic: generic-leaning phrasing present: scalable solutions).
- sectionVisibility: structure or presentation updated.
- Experience id 5: moderate update to bullets and/or line items.
- Experience id 8: removed from resume.
- Project id 9: moderate description/stack revision.
- Project id 10: moderate description/stack revision.
- Skills id 58: minor name/category touch-up.
- Skills id 60: minor name/category touch-up.

tailorExplanation.paragraph: I treated this as an adjacent match for Conversational AI Engineer (LLM & Google Cloud) at Pyramid Consulting, so I focused on transferable proof instead of pretending every JD term was already in your background. The strongest direct overlap I found was flow, applications, artificial intelligence, and Python; the rest of the draft bridges from nearby evidence where your resume supports it. I prioritized role signals like Python, artificial intelligence, healthcare, and ci/cd over company/product context like azure. A few terms were not named exactly, but related resume evidence supports ci/cd, azure, cloud, and cross functional collaboration. I trimmed Hawkers Host / Expo because they were weaker signals for this read. The biggest help here: kept the projects that best prove the role fit, reframed your experience around the job's strongest signals, and gave the summary a clearer role-specific angle. Under the hood, I changed the summary, experience, projects, skills, and which sections show based on those signals.

details.title: Why it changed
items: Target story: Proven experience in developing AI-driven applications with Python and cloud technologies, emphasizing backend services and API integrations.
Main evidence themes: AI integration, backend services, and cloud deployment.

details.title: Fit read
items: Adjacent fit: bridge from proven evidence into the target role. Use transferable language, but do not claim the candidate already owns JD-only duties.
Transferable evidence I considered: BitGo Software Engineering Intern, Bar Louie Server, and Hawkers Host / Expo.

details.title: Related evidence
items: ci/cd: related evidence includes aws, ec2, and deployed.
azure: related evidence includes aws, ec2, and deployed.
cloud: related evidence includes aws, ec2, and deployed.

details.title: Worth checking
items: Some JD terms were not directly evidenced: healthcare, flow, and conversational.
Some generic phrasing may still be worth tightening.

reframed your experience around the job's strongest signals
gave the summary a clearer role-specific angle

subsections.Relevant Coursework: Massive Storage & Big Data, Enterprise Computing, Object-Oriented Software Design
subsections.Honors & Awards: Dean’s List 2021, President’s Honor Roll 2023 – 2025, Pegasus Gold Scholarship
subsections.Clubs & Extracurriculars: AI @ UCF, Knight Hacks, SHPE @ UCF

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
experience.description:
• Developed backend services and REST APIs in Python/Django to support secure workflows for financial and compliance teams.
• Collaborated with senior engineers on system design and architecture, contributing to scalable service patterns and data modeling.
• Created React dashboards integrated with Django APIs, improving visibility into operational metrics and backend data workflows.
• Optimized Python data-processing pipelines and PostgreSQL queries, achieving a ~40% reduction in latency.
experience.skills: Python, Django, React, PostgreSQL, AWS EC2

experience.title: Server
experience.description:
• Adapting to high-pressure situations and thriving under stress.
• Effective communication with guests, kitchen, and bar teams.
• Working seamlessly in fast-paced collaborative environments.

projects.title: Centi – Personal Finance App
projects.description:
• Developed a personal finance application that automates account aggregation and transaction tracking, providing users with insightful financial analytics.
• Designed FastAPI services and PostgreSQL schemas for Plaid integrations, ensuring reliable transaction processing.
• Created responsive React dashboards for user account management and transaction reviews, enhancing user engagement.
• Implemented secure data handling protocols (OAuth/JWT) to protect user financial information.

projects.title: Taylor.io – Resume Builder & Parser
projects.description:
• Developed an AI-powered resume builder that automates the parsing of PDF/DOCX files into structured data, improving user experience.
• Built backend services for parsing and authentication using FastAPI and PostgreSQL, streamlining data workflows.
• Created a real-time editing interface in React, allowing users to customize resumes effectively.
• Integrated OpenAI API for intelligent content generation, facilitating automated resume editing and extraction.

projects.title: SecureScape – Smart Security System
projects.description:
• Developed the Flutter mobile app with core controls including alarm toggling, lighting, photo capture, and recording  access.
• Built the Python backend and communication layer for device coordination, enabling reliable messaging and near real time alerts (<3.5s).

projects.title: ShelfVision - Dense Shelf Object Detection
projects.description:
• Detects products in crowded retail shelf photos using ResNet-50 and FPN features.
• Handles overlapping items with smart anchor matching and IoU-based detection algorithms.
• Benchmarked on SKU-110K dataset with comprehensive metrics and YOLOv5 comparisons.

projects.title: Tizirsso Racing – Portfolio & Sponsorship Website
projects.description:
• Built a custom motorsport portfolio site translating brand identity and racing history into a polished, mobile-first  experience.
• Developed interactive UI sections including an animated hero, editorial about page, career timeline, team history,  championship highlights, and image galleries with lightbox support.

projects.title: SentimentTrader -  Real-Time Stock Sentiment Pipeline
projects.description:
• Designed and implemented an end-to-end production-style ML data pipeline for real-time sentiment analytics, processing 1K+ Reddit finance posts per run via multi-stage ETL.
• Applied NLP models (FinBERT) and feature engineering to build 40+ predictive features per ticker; trained XGBoost models achieving 55–70% ROC-AUC.
• Built modular components for data ingestion, transformation, model inference, and distributed-style batching, aligned with message-driven architectures.
• Automated end-to-end data collection, preprocessing, and model inference workflows, enabling scalable real-time analytics.

summary.summary: Proficient in developing AI-driven applications with a focus on backend services and cloud technologies. Experienced in Python and FastAPI, with a strong foundation in API development and data processing. Committed to creating scalable solutions that enhance user interactions and streamline workflows.

summary.before: Full-stack engineer specializing in scalable data pipelines, platforms, and backend services. Skilled in React, Python, and Java, with strong database and API expertise. Passionate about turning complex data into reliable, user-focused applications.
summary.after: Proficient in developing AI-driven applications with a focus on backend services and cloud technologies. Experienced in Python and FastAPI, with a strong foundation in API development and data processing. Committed to creating scalable solutions that enhance user interactions and streamline workflows.

description.before:
• Built and maintained backend services and REST APIs in Python/Django supporting secure internal workflows for financial and compliance teams.
• Collaborated with senior engineers on system design, requirements, and architecture, contributing to scalable service patterns and data modeling.
• Developed React dashboards integrated with Django APIs, improving visibility into backend data workflows and operational metrics.
• Optimized Python data-processing pipelines and PostgreSQL queries, improving system scalability and reducing latency by ~40%.
description.after:
• Developed backend services and REST APIs in Python/Django to support secure workflows for financial and compliance teams.
• Collaborated with senior engineers on system design and architecture, contributing to scalable service patterns and data modeling.
• Created React dashboards integrated with Django APIs, improving visibility into operational metrics and backend data workflows.
• Optimized Python data-processing pipelines and PostgreSQL queries, achieving a ~40% reduction in latency.

before.title: Host / Expo
before.description:
• Attention to detail in every order for consistent quality.
• Clear communication with customers, kitchen, and delivery teams.
• Direct impact on business revenue - managing ~35% of store sales.

description.before:
• Built and deployed a full-stack finance application that automates account aggregation, transaction tracking, and spending insights across a unified dashboard.
• Designed FastAPI services and PostgreSQL schemas for Plaid integrations, enabling reliable transaction processing and normalized data storage.
• Developed responsive React dashboards and authentication flows for account management, transaction review, and financial analytics.
• Implemented authentication and secure data handling (OAuth/JWT), ensuring protected access to financial data and user account workflows.
• Made it secure n stuff.
description.after:
• Developed a personal finance application that automates account aggregation and transaction tracking, providing users with insightful financial analytics.
• Designed FastAPI services and PostgreSQL schemas for Plaid integrations, ensuring reliable transaction processing.
• Created responsive React dashboards for user account management and transaction reviews, enhancing user engagement.
• Implemented secure data handling protocols (OAuth/JWT) to protect user financial information.

description.before:
• Built an AI-powered resume platform that automates parsing of PDF/DOCX files into structured, editable profile data.
• Implemented backend services for parsing, authentication, and export workflows using FastAPI and PostgreSQL.
• Created a live editing and preview experience in React, enabling users to customize resume content in real time through  a clean, guided interface.
• Integrated OpenAI API for structured parsing and content generation, enabling automated resume extraction and  editing workflows.
description.after:
• Developed an AI-powered resume builder that automates the parsing of PDF/DOCX files into structured data, improving user experience.
• Built backend services for parsing and authentication using FastAPI and PostgreSQL, streamlining data workflows.
• Created a real-time editing interface in React, allowing users to customize resumes effectively.
• Integrated OpenAI API for intelligent content generation, facilitating automated resume editing and extraction.

changeReasons.reason: Profile summary updated for Conversational AI Engineer (LLM & Google Cloud); audit flagged common generic phrasing in the new text (scalable solutions)—tighten to concrete systems and evidence from the resume.
Adjusted the resume layout (section visibility) so the strongest evidence is easier to find.
experience row 5: updated the bullets to foreground the role-relevant work.
Removed Hawkers Host / Expo because it was less relevant for this draft.
project 9: revised the description and stack so the fit is easier to scan.
project 10: revised the description and stack so the fit is easier to scan.
skill row 58: label or category cleanup.
skill row 60: label or category cleanup.
